name: Pasta e Fagioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beans and cold water in a 6-quart pot and bring to a boil.
2. Cover the pot and turn off the heat (leave the pot covered on the burner used).
3. Allow to stand for 1 hour.
4. Drain the beans and return them to the pot.
5. Add the wine and beef and chicken stock, and bring to a boil. Cover and simmer gently for 30 minutes.
6. Strain out half the beans and puree.
7. Return the pureed beans to the pot.
8. Add the garlic, tomato paste, parsley, and raw tubetti pasta, and simmer gently, uncovered, for 25 to 30 minutes or until the pasta is very tender and the soup is thick.
9. Stir the soup regularly to prevent the pasta from sticking to the bottom of the pot.
10. Stir in the grated Parmesan cheese.
11. Garnish with chopped parsley, a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil, and additional grated Parmesan cheese.
